channel.title: French Coffee on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in French Coffee on Barista At Home

item.title: Café au Lait and Caffè Misto: What They Are, How to Make Them, and How They Differ from a Latte
item.description: Café au lait is brewed coffee with hot milk — not espresso. Learn how it differs from a latte, how to make the French and New Orleans styles, and how to order Starbucks' Caffè Misto.
